calendar.matters:
Notice Of And Motion For Order Setting Aside Judgment By Default And Dismissing Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE, N.A. Motion For Order Setting Aside Judgment By Default And Dismissing Without Prejudice.

Plaintiff Capital One, N.A.'s unopposed Motion For Order Setting Aside Judgment By Default And Dismissing Without Prejudice is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court orders set aside the Judgment entered December 30, 2024.

Further, good cause appearing, the court orders the action dismissed without prejudice.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the above text and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
